checklist.label: Unnecessary items removed from work areas
Only today's materials and tools are present
All tools returned to correct storage location
Walkways and exits are clear and unobstructed
Labels and signage are visible and correct
No products left on work benches
Work surfaces wiped down and free of debris
Floor swept and free of waste
Rubbish bins emptied (not overflowing)
Tape, bubble wrap and shrink wrap all in stock
Carton holders on dispatch bench stocked
Bulk carton stock checked (at least 1 pallet or bundle of each size remaining)
FedEx bags in stock
Tape and shrink wrap in stock
Any issues from yesterday's checklist resolved
Accident or near miss register completed (if relevant)
Forklift and order picker pre-use checks completed
Team briefed on any changes or issues
Corrective actions from prior checks are on track
Clear Cardbaord Boxes
Empty skip bin and cardbaord bin (not overflowing)
